title: This one — how much?
pedagogy: Vocabulary: อัน (mid อ + live น → mid), นี้ (LOW น + mai tho → high), แพง (low พ + live ง → mid), ถูก (high ถ + dead ก → low). Pattern: อันนี้ 'this one' + เท่าไหร่ (unit 4 review) is the universal price question — pointing does the vocabulary's job.

exercises.title: อันนี้ — the pointing phrase
body: You don't need the word for mango. Point and say อันนี้ — “this one” — and every market in Thailand understands you.
อันนี้เท่าไหร่ครับ/คะ is the complete shopping starter kit: this one, how much?
Then judge the answer: แพง expensive, ถูก cheap. (ถูก also means “correct” — Thai enjoys a pun.)

exercises.meaning: How much is this one? (male speaker)
exercises.gloss: thing + this + how-much + male polite particle
exercises.explanation: อันนี้ first, question word in the answer slot, particle last — the pattern you already own, now earning money.
